Interface ParameterRenderer<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of the parameter value this renderer handles.
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractTextResourceWriteRenderer, CodeRefinementBatchRenderer, DeprecatedCodeRefinementBatchRendererPolymorphic, FullTextFileCreateRenderer, FullTextResourceUpdateRenderer, JavaCodeParameterRenderer, MarkupParameterRenderer, ObjectToStringParameterRenderer, PathParameterRenderer, ResourceUUIDParameterRenderer, TextResourceLineEditsRenderer, TextResourceReplacementsRenderer, UriParameterRenderer
public interface ParameterRenderer<T>
A generic interface for rendering tool parameters. This can render anything from a code diff to a monkey in pajamas.
Author:
anahata

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JComponent
    getComponent()
    Returns the Swing component that performs the rendering.
    void
    init(AgiPanel agiPanel, AbstractToolCall<?,?> call, String paramName, T value)
    Initializes the renderer with its context.
    boolean
    render()
    Triggers the rendering logic.
    void
    updateContent(T value)
    Updates the renderer with a new value.

  • Method Details

    • init

      void init(AgiPanel agiPanel, AbstractToolCall<?,?> call, String paramName, T value)
      Initializes the renderer with its context.
      Parameters:
      agiPanel - The parent agi panel.
      call - The tool call being rendered.
      paramName - The name of the parameter.
      value - The initial value.

    • getComponent

      JComponent getComponent()
      Returns the Swing component that performs the rendering.
      Returns:
      The rendering component.

    • updateContent

      void updateContent(T value)
      Updates the renderer with a new value.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value to render.

    • render

      boolean render()
      Triggers the rendering logic.
      Returns:
      True if a visual update occurred.
